title: TIM - Process Indicators Against Business Partners IP List
content:
This playbook processes indicators to check if they exist in a Cortex XSOAR list containing business partner IP addresses, and tags the indicators accordingly.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (TIM_Processing, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.

Inputs — BusinessPartnersIPListName: A Cortex XSOAR list containing business partner IP address values. IP Indicators that appear in the list are tagged as business partner ip..

Outputs — BusinessPartnerIP: IP addresses that are found in the business partner ip list.; NotBusinessPartnerIP: IP addresses that are not found in the business partner ip list..

Integrations/scripts used: FilterByList, SetAndHandleEmpty.

name: TIM - Process Indicators Against Business Partners IP List
description: This playbook processes indicators to check if they exist
